name: Srivichaivejvivat Public Company Limited
summary: Srivichaivejvivat Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates hospitals in Thailand. Its medical services include treatment for the various heart disease, such as coronary artery bypass grafting, valvular repair/replacement, and congenital heart disease correction; various health check-up programs; services related to child development; various emergency services; and orthopedic service related to joint pain, hip pain, knee pain, trigger finger, hand pain, elbow or shoulder pain, etc. The company also provides treatment for cardiovascular disease, neurological and brain, allergy, cancer, respiratory diseases and lung, urinary tract and liver, sports injury, woman and occupational disease, digestive disease, and diabetes and endocrine, as well as blood, kidneys, and skin; and general radiography, fluoroscopy, computed tomography scanning services. In addition, it offers occupational therapy, elderly, and pediatric rehabilitation services, as well as rehabilitation services of patients with spinal cord injury, bone and joint, back pain, neck pain, shoulder pain, heart disease, cancer disease, and neuropathy; and services related to diagnosing bone and muscle abnormalities. Further, the company provides gastrointestinal, neurological, plastic, urology, orthopedics, laparoscopic, and cardiac surgery, as well as staple hemorrhoidectomy; treatment for ear, nose, and throat, such as otitis, sinusitis, etc.; hemodialysis procedure that cleans and filters the blood; dialysis services; anti-aging services; treatment for eye diseases; dermatological and dental services; medical treatment with traditional Chinese medicine; maternal and child care services. It also operates a vocational school. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Krathum Baen, Thailand.
